ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artifacts" (
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artifact */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist who created the artifact (if known) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the artifact was created */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label or title of the artifact */,
  "_date" TEXT /* Date the artifact was created (if known) */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of artifact (e.g., manuscript, map, panel) */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current location of the artifact */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the artifact (e.g., URL of image on Wikimedia Commons) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the artifact */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) used in the artifact */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the artifact (e.g., height, width, depth) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the artifact (e.g., excellent, good, fair, poor) */,
  "date_acquired" TEXT /* Date when the artifact was acquired by the museum */,
  "acquisition_method" TEXT /* Method of acquisition (e.g., donation, purchase, exchange) */,
  "provenance" TEXT /* Detailed provenance information (e.g., previous owners, historical context) */,
  "conservation_notes" TEXT /* Notes on any conservation efforts or treatments */,
  "copyright_status" TEXT /* Copyright status of the artifact (e.g., public domain, restricted) */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility information (e.g., available for public viewing, restricted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artifact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artifact the image is associated with */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* File path to the thumbnail image */,
  "manifest" TEXT /* File path to the manifest file */,
  "full_image" TEXT /* File path to the full image */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1080p, 4K) */,
  "format" TEXT /* File format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG, TIFF) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded to the system */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the image */,
  "copyright_status" TEXT /* Copyright status of the image (e.g., public domain, restricted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_artifact_id FOREIGN KEY ("artifact_id") REFERENCES artifacts ("artifact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artifact in the collection */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the collection (e.g., qatar_item) */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the artifact in the collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "collection_description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the collection */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the collection was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the collection */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the collection was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_artifact_id FOREIGN KEY ("artifact_id") REFERENCES artifacts ("artifact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., curator, conservator, administrator) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
